emails.subject: Re: Allen Gage/Rockets Tickets
emails.body: Re: Allen Gage/Rockets Tickets KLL has polled his sons and determined that the 4 games he is willing to sell to Mr. Gage are as follows: 2/26 Portland Trailblazers 1/30 Miami Heat 1/13 Sacramento Kings 1/6 Utah Jazz

emails.subject: Re: Allen Gage/Rockets Tickets
emails.body: Sally, Thank you for the update. I will communicate these dates with Mr. Gage, and get back with you to coordinate payment and delivery of tickets. Again, thanks. DT (3-7883) Sally Keepers@ENRON 10/03/2000 09:58 AM
